summary: Live PR inventory shard classified independently. No shared canonical was selected. One security-sensitive listed PR and one linked security-sensitive issue are routed to central security handling. Several open PRs remain open because this job blocks merge, fix, and PR creation; exact maintainer decisions are isolated in needs_human actions.
